Excellent attention and service.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención , tenían el tv prendido con partido y nadie atendiendo tuve que llamar a los gritos para que alguien venga, tranquilamente podrían robar todo

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster. They had the TV on showing a game and nobody was answering. I had to yell for someone to come. They could easily have stolen everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqeG9yNVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente el personal, todos muy amables! compramos 1 budin casero y nos prestaron el cuchillo para cortarlo. El lugar es amplio y limpio.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were excellent, everyone was very friendly! We bought a homemade pudding and they lent us a knife to cut it. The place is spacious and clean.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were filthy, which is a shame since the place is small and everyone there is a tourist.

reviews.comment:
El peor lugar para cargar combustible la atencion mala estaba cargando combustible y la mangera se rompio y salio mucho combustible y la chica que cargaba combustible no tomo ninguna medida de seguridad me cobro todo hasta lo que se habia caido al piso que fue mucho le dije porque me iba a cobrar lo que se cayo y me dijo la culpa no fue de ella asi que lo tenia que pagar yo no me limpio lo que se ensucio del auto donde se cayo el combustible y no tiro nada donde habia caido combustible al piso seguia cargando normalmente el baño muy sucio sin papel sin jabon sin nada quise comprar medias lunas el el service club no me cargaban los puntos si no pagaba en efectivo la verdad todo muy mal ahi

(Translated by Google)
The worst place to get gas. The service was terrible. I was filling up and the hose broke, and a lot of fuel spilled out. The girl pumping the gas didn't take any safety precautions. She charged me for everything, even what had spilled on the floor, which was a lot. I asked her why she was charging me for what spilled, and she said it wasn't her fault, so I had to pay. She didn't clean up the spilled fuel on the car, and she didn't even clean up the spilled fuel. She just kept pumping normally. The bathroom was filthy, with no toilet paper, no soap, nothing. I wanted to buy croissants at the service club, but they wouldn't credit my points unless I paid in cash. Honestly, everything was awful there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkOU9maF93RRAB
